name: KELLY SERVICES INC
business: Kelly Services is a global specialty talent solutions company providing temporary and permanent staffing, outcome-based solutions, recruitment process outsourcing (RPO), managed service provider (MSP) programs, and payroll process outsourcing (PPO). The company serves employers of all sizes and sectors, including Fortune 500 enterprises, government agencies, and educational institutions, primarily in North America with global capabilities. Its three reportable segments are Enterprise Talent Management, Science, Engineering & Technology, and Education.

exposures.sentence: Kelly is a global specialty talent solutions company operating in three specialized business units, which are also our reportable segments.
The Company employs a range of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies to support its talent related solutions.
Technological advances, including advances in automation and artificial intelligence, may significantly disrupt the labor market and weaken demand for human capital.

catalysts.event: First phase of integrating SET business into enterprise system completed and went live
catalysts.sentence: The first phase of integrating the SET business was completed and went live in early 2026.
